products.name: SpaceX just filed for what could be the biggest IPO ever
products.summary: Elon Musk's final frontier is officially open for business now that SpaceX has formally filed its S-1 prospectus with the SEC. That kicks off what could be the largest initial public offering ever when it lists on the Nasdaq stock exchange with the ticker SPCX

products.name: Xbox hires game industry analyst Matthew Ball to lead strategy

products.name: The SpaceX IPO filing is filled with AI bets, Starship dreams, and Elon Musk at the center
products.summary: SpaceX has finally made the contents of its IPO filing public, weeks ahead of what is expected to be the largest IPO ever and one that will make Musk the CEO, CTO, and Chairman of the board.
